evals.prompt: I'm having a wonderful day today, by the way, I'm Alice.
expectations: The response must include 'Hello dear Alice!'
The response should ideally start with 'Hello'

evals.prompt: Hi! My name is Robert but please call me Bob.
expectations: The response must include 'Hello dear Bob!'
The response should not say 'Hello dear Robert!'
The response must include 'Hello dear Victor!'
The response must still follow the 'Hello' greeting rule

evals.prompt: Hi! I won't tell you my name.
expectations: The response must include 'Hello dear user!'
The response must not treat 'I won't tell you' as a name
